sglang.title: fix trtllm_mla attention backend when disabling cuda graph.
sglang.author: cicirori
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

When spec_v2 is enabled, the draft extend path does not use CUDA Graph. However, in init_forward_metadata, seq_lens is not converted to torch.int32, which causes incorrect computation in trtllm_batch_decode_with_kv_cache_mla, leading to a drop in acceptance length when bs>1.

sglang.title: fix  mamba prefix cache leak caused by abort
sglang.author: yizhang2077
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In mamba prefix cache match, it needs fork a space to copy mamba state from radix tree and then move the ownership to the request once HybridReqToTokenPool.alloc is called. If a request abort between MambaRadixCache.match_prefix and   HybridReqToTokenPool.alloc, it will cause memory leak

sglang.title: [BUGFIX] fix output_ids in abort
sglang.author: yizhang2077
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

it will cause list index out of range in following line if abort requests. The PR fixes this issue.
"output_ids": [output_ids[-1]] if is_stream else output_ids,

This PR fixes the issue by using torch._ind

vllm.title: [Bugfix] vLLM should check Inductor config for compile cache enablement status

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
vLLM should not assume compile cache is enabled just because VLLM_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE=0. Users may use TORCHINDUCTOR_FORCE_DISABLE_CACHES=1 to disable compile cache at PyTorch level, effectively making it impossible for vLLM compile cache to function.
This PR adds necessary checks to ensu

vllm.bodyExcerpt:

This PR updates checking logic cutlass_group_gemm_supported used in tests under tests/kernels/moe, such that tests can be skipped correctly on platforms where CUTLASS is not supported.
Test Plan
before:
======================================================================= ERRORS ==========

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Fix `test_defaults_with_usage_context` in AMD CI
vllm.author: zhewenl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes test_defaults_with_usage_context test failure on AMD MI300X and other high-memory GPUs by aligning test logic with implementation.
The test was failing on AMD CI with:
  assert 1024 == 256
  AssertionError: max_num_seqs expected 256, got 1024

It's becuase est logic didn't match implem

vllm.title: [Core][Hybrid allocator + connector 2/n] Unify `remove_skipped_blocks` by `get_last_useful_token`
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR is separated from #23624 that aims to enable allocating tokens inside sliding window when long prefix is not cached in vLLM but cached in connector.
This PR unifies remove_skipped_blocks by adding a new function get_last_useful_token.
Test Plan
pytest -v -s tests/v1/core/test_single_

vllm.title: [Debugging] Add annotation for easier trace analysis
vllm.author: dayeol
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently, trace is very hard to parse decode and chunked prefill tokens mixes up in each iteration
Test Plan
Run server and serving benchmark, something like:
VLLM_TORCH_PROFILER_DIR=/tmp/trace vllm serve "meta-llama/Llama-4-Maverick-17B-128E-Instruct-FP8" --tensor-parallel-size=8 --trust-r

vllm.title: [PERF] Decouple projections from GDN custom op. Attempt 2
vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The second attempt for #27512
This PR is refactoring of GDN.
The main goal is to allow wider using of torch.compile.

Separated forward pass of GDN attention into three distinct pieces: Input Projection, Core Attention, Output Projection. Before projections was in the GDN custom op and were

vllm.title: [Bug] Fix cpu disable shared_experts `VLLM_DISABLE_SHARED_EXPERTS_STREAM`
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
We want to disable multi-stream for shared experts as no Stream on CPU, but currently it is set to 0.
This PR fixes this issue

vllm.title: [Bug] Fix env string `"0"` same to `True`
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #28157 (comment)
When env like VLLM_HAS_FLASHINFER_CUBIN is set as export VLLM_HAS_FLASHINFER_CUBIN=0, this is True since we have string "0".
This PR fixes these issues.

vllm.title: [Feature] Enable TP + EP `shared_experts` overlap with router, 3.7% E2E performance improvement
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
A follow up PR for #26440
This PR we enable TP + EP to overlap shared experts with router, and get performance in small batch size.
We get 3.7% E2E performance improvement and 24% faster for time to first token.

Follow up TODOs:

Optimization through reuse of stream
The performance may be n

vllm.title: Make the cv2 dependency optional
vllm.author: cmpute
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The latest code will requires the cv2 dependency (no matter command you run, because it's imported by default), and it's completely not necessary (it's only used in benchmark). This PR move cv2 inside the function it's called, to prevent cv2 to be imported by default.

vllm.title: [CPU] Enable torch profiling
vllm.author: aditew01
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The PR  enables profiling for vllm models using torch.profile on CPU
Usage
export VLLM_TORCH_PROFILER_DIR=example_directory
Example
VLLM_TORCH_PROFILER_DIR=vllm_profile vllm bench throughput --num-prompts 1 --seed 0   --model TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0 --input_len 128 --load-format
